validate.notes: Prior fireworks/kimi run made all four checks pass (Dockerfile, solve.sh, eval_manifest.yaml, judge.py). Subsequent claude-opus-4-7 re-validation attempt could not execute any commands: harness Bash tool fails immediately with `EACCES: permission denied, mkdir /home/worker/.claude/session-env` before dispatch, and writes under /home/worker/.claude are blocked as sensitive. No task files were modified in this re-run; relying on the prior pass. Other tools (Read/Glob/Grep/Edit) work fine — only Bash/Docker is unreachable.
